items.name: firstColumnContent
items.description: Content for the first (or only) column.ReactNode

items.name: secondColumnContent
items.description: Content for the second column (when using split layout).ReactNode

items.name: hideTrayWhenExpanded
items.description: Hides the tray bar when content is expanded.boolean

items.name: brandTheme
items.description: Override the theme at component level."primary""secondary""tertiary"

items.name: isiContentSelector
items.description: CSS selector for ISI content (for scroll tracking).string

items.name: classNames
items.description: CSS class names for component parts.{ isiTrayInPageBody?: string; isiTrayWrapper?: string; isiTrayWrapperExpanded?: string \

items.name: shouldHideOnDualColumn
items.description: Hides the tray on screens wide enough for dual column.boolean

items.name: onClickExpand
items.description: Callback when expand button clicked((e: MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement, MouseEvent>) => void)

items.name: onClickMinimize
items.description: Callback when minimize button clicked((e: MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement, MouseEvent>) => void)

slots.note: Slots are not reliably extractable from current MD/index sources.

snippets:
import { IsiTray, Title, TitleVariant, Typography, TypographyVariant } from "@sanofi-accelerator/elements";

const Example = () => (
  <IsiTray
      firstColumnHeader="Important Safety Informations"
      firstColumnContent={
        <>
          <Title variant={TitleVariant.TITLE_5}>
            Important Safety Informations
          </Title>
          <Typography variant={TypographyVariant.BODY_MEDIUM}>
            Lorem, ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit.
          </Typography>
          <Typography variant={TypographyVariant.BODY_MEDIUM}>
            Lorem, ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit.
            Eligendi ipsa, repellat asperiores dicta laboriosam placeat odit
            quisquam atque doloribus corrupti suscipit officia minima ut
            assumenda mollitia tempore pariatur vitae numquam.
          </Typography>
        </>
      }
    />
);

notes: Accessibility terms are present in the docs. Validate exact behavior before production use.

token_bindings.note: Use semantic-token-map.json and component primitive contracts for HTML styling.

fallback_policy.reason: Component has at least one registered primitive contract.
